name: Fried Won Tons
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell and devein the prawns. Mince them fine.
2. Stem the mushrooms and mince the caps.
3. Mix the minced prawns, pork, water chestnuts, green onions, half of the beaten eggs, and all of the seasonings.
4. WRAPPING:
a. Place won ton squares on a working surface so the corners face up, down, left, and right.
b. Place 1 teaspoon of filling in the center of each skin.
c. Dip a little of the beaten egg onto the bottom corner, bring the top corner to meet it, and press to seal.
d. Moisten the left corner and bring the right corner to meet it, pressing to seal. This should give you a bundle that looks like a nurses hat.
5. FRYING:
a. Heat 4 cups of oil in a wok.
b. Fry the wrapped won tons until golden (about 2 minutes). Turn over once.
c. Drain and serve hot.
DO-AHEAD NOTES:
- Deep fry the won tons, cool, and freeze them. To reheat, preheat the oven to 350°F, place the frozen won tons on cookie sheets, and heat for 12 to 15 minutes.
COMMENTS:
You may substitute ground turkey for meat in the won ton filling. However, since turkey is drier and more bland than pork, add a few more water chestnuts and 1/4 tsp. monosodium glutamate to enhance flavor and texture.
